evals.prompt: Scrape the X/Twitter profile for the handle openai using Scrape Creators.
evals.expected_output: The skill runs the routed Scrape Creators twitter/profile step and returns the profile JSON (bio, follower counts).
assertions: The skill triggers (scrapecreators) for a social profile scrape request
The step rail is routed with maxAmount 0.02

evals.prompt: Show me TikTok's trending feed for the US region.
evals.expected_output: The routed tiktok/get-trending-feed step runs with region=US and returns trending videos.
assertions: The skill triggers for a trending-feed request

evals.prompt: Pull the LinkedIn company page data for https://linkedin.com/company/anthropic.
evals.expected_output: The routed linkedin/company step runs with the supplied company URL and returns size, industry, locations, specialties.
assertions: The linkedinCompanyUrl param is used in the linkedin/company step URL
The step method is GET and rail routed

evals.prompt: Get the data for this Instagram reel: https://instagram.com/p/abc123
evals.expected_output: The routed instagram/post step runs with the supplied post URL and returns the post/reel JSON.
assertions: The instagramPostUrl param flows into the instagram/post step
The step rail is routed with maxAmount 0.02

evals.prompt: Run the full scrapecreators skill with defaults.
evals.expected_output: All 12 routed steps run and the run cost is capped at the manifest maxAmount.
assertions: Top-level maxAmount is 0.24 (sum of 12 steps at 0.02)
Every step has rail routed and host api.scrapecreators.com

evals.prompt: What's the weather forecast for Lisbon this weekend?
evals.expected_output: The scrapecreators skill does NOT trigger; this is unrelated to social media scraping.
assertions: The scrapecreators skill is not selected
No Scrape Creators endpoint is called
